steps.title: Move the x terms together
steps.content:
Start with $-37x=-74x$. Add $74x$ to both sides:
$$37x=0$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
Divide by $37$:
$$x=0$$
This is one specific solution.

steps.title: Classify the equation
steps.content: The equation has exactly one solution because only $x=0$ works. It is not infinitely many solutions because not every value of $x$ makes the original equation true.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The equation has exactly one solution, so B is correct.
